channel.title: terminal on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in terminal on IT notes

item.title: stty
item.description: If reset can’t clean your terminal, give a try to: stty sane

item.title: nohup - disown
item.description: In case you don’t have screen/tmux and need to run a process that won’t be terminated after closing the terminal: $ nohup your command & $ exit Or $ your command & $ disown $ exit If you have multiple commands: $ sleep 3600 & $ sleep 86400 & By typing jobs something like this appears: [1] - running sleep 3600 [2] + running sleep 86400 To disown let’s say only job 2:
